Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.Variable

Packages that use Variable
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.analysis.io
File formats used by the MOEA Framework analysis codes.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.operator
Package of various mutation and crossover operators.
org.moeaframework.core.spi
Defines the service provider interfaces (SPIs) and factories for constructing problems, algorithms and operators.
org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.
org.moeaframework.util.format
Classes for formatting data into a tabular format.
org.moeaframework.util.validate
Methods for validating inputs, arguments, and properties.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Variable
    ResultFileReader.decode(Variable variable, String string)
    Decodes string representations of decision variables, returning the variable with the decoded value.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis.io with parameters of type Variable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Variable
    ResultFileReader.decode(Variable variable, String string)
    Decodes string representations of decision variables, returning the variable with the decoded value.
    String
    ResultFileWriter.encode(Variable variable)
    Encodes the decision variable into a string representation that can be safely written to a result file.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Variable
    Variable.copy()
    Returns an independent copy of this decision variable.
    Variable

    Returns the variable at the specified index.

    Method
    Description
    default boolean
    Problem.isType(Class<? extends Variable> type)
    Returns true if all decision variables used by this solution are the given type.

  • Uses of Variable in org.moeaframework.core.operator

    Classes in org.moeaframework.core.operator with type parameters of type Variable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TypeSafeCrossover<T extends Variable>
    An abstract variation class that validates the types of each variable before applying the crossover operation with a given probability.
    class 
    TypeSafeMutation<T extends Variable>
    An abstract mutation class that validates the types of each variable before applying the mutation operation with a given probability.

  • Uses of Variable in org.moeaframework.core.spi

    Method parameters in org.moeaframework.core.spi with type arguments of type Variable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    RegisteredOperatorProvider.setCrossoverHint(Class<? extends Variable> type, String operator)
    Sets the crossover hint for the given decision variable type, overwriting any existing hint.
    protected final void
    RegisteredOperatorProvider.setMutationHint(Class<? extends Variable> type, String operator)
    Sets the mutation hint for the given decision variable type, overwriting any existing hint.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    BinaryIntegerVariable
    Decision variable for integers encoded as a binary string.
    class 
    BinaryVariable
    Decision variable for binary strings.
    class 
    Grammar
    Decision variable for grammars.
    class 
    Permutation
    Decision variable for permutations.
    class 
    Program
    A decision variable for programs.

    Subset
    Decision variable for subsets.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.variable with parameters of type Variable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean[]
    EncodingUtils.getBinary(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a binary decision variable as a boolean array.
    static BitSet
    EncodingUtils.getBitSet(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a binary decision variable as a BitSet.
    static boolean
    EncodingUtils.getBoolean(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a boolean decision variable.
    static int
    EncodingUtils.getInt(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in an integer-valued decision variable.
    static int[]
    EncodingUtils.getOrderedSubset(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a subset decision variable with the items sorted.
    static int[]
    EncodingUtils.getPermutation(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a permutation decision variable.
    static double
    EncodingUtils.getReal(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a floating-point decision variable.
    static int[]
    EncodingUtils.getSubset(Variable variable)
    Returns the value stored in a subset decision variable.
    static boolean[]
    EncodingUtils.getSubsetAsBinary(Variable variable)
    Returns the subset as a binary string, where 1 indicates the index is included in the set.
    static BitSet
    EncodingUtils.getSubsetAsBitSet(Variable variable)
    Returns the subset as a BitSet, where a set bit indicates the index is included in the set.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setBinary(Variable variable, boolean[] values)
    Sets the bits in a binary decision variable using the given boolean array.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setBitSet(Variable variable, BitSet bitSet)
    Sets the bits in a binary decision variable using the given BitSet.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setBoolean(Variable variable, boolean value)
    Sets the value of a boolean decision variable.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setInt(Variable variable, int value)
    Sets the value of an integer-valued decision variable.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setPermutation(Variable variable, int[] values)
    Sets the value of a permutation decision variable.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setReal(Variable variable, double value)
    Sets the value of a floating-point decision variable.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setSubset(Variable variable, boolean[] values)
    Sets the value of a subset decision variable using a binary string representation.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setSubset(Variable variable, int[] values)
    Sets the value of a subset decision variable.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setSubset(Variable variable, BitSet bitSet)
    Sets the value of a subset decision variable using a BitSet representation.
